## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark all that apply. -->

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor / style — no behavior change
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore / perf — tooling or performance

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes (coverage floor met)
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` and `bun run fmt:check` pass
- [ ] Docs and examples updated if the public surface changed
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`<type>(<scope>): <subject>`)
- [ ] No secrets (API keys, tokens) in code, tests, or fixtures
